meaning: adj.[动]古北区(包括欧洲、 亚洲北部阿拉伯北部以及非洲的撒哈拉以北部分)的
examples: They are mainly distributed in the palaearctic, nearctic, oriental, ethiopian region.
Distribution in north America, Palaearctic, India and the north-west Himalayas mountain.
Conclusion The Calyptratae fauna in Pangquangou Nature Reserve of Shanxi province was mostly palaearctic.
